  data_collection_methods varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of data collection methods used: household surveys, FGD (Focus Group Discussion), KII (Key Informant Interview), PDM (Post-Distribution Monitoring), direct observation, secondary data review, etc.']
  dissemination_date date [note: 'Date when the evaluation findings were formally disseminated to stakeholders, donors, and internal teams.']
  effectiveness_rating varchar [note: 'Rating of the program\'s effectiveness (extent to which objectives were achieved) per DAC criteria.']
  efficiency_rating varchar [note: 'Rating of the program\'s efficiency (value for money, resource utilization) per DAC criteria.']
  ethics_approval_obtained boolean [note: 'Indicates whether ethics approval or institutional review board clearance was obtained for the evaluation, particularly for studies involving vulnerable populations (true/false).']
  evaluation_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code or reference number for the evaluation, used in donor reports and internal tracking.']
  evaluation_scope varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the evaluation scope, including geographic coverage, beneficiary segments, program components, and time period covered.']
  evaluation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the evaluation: planned (scheduled but not started), inception (terms of reference development), fieldwork (data collection in progress), analysis (data analysis phase), draft_report (draft under review), final_report (completed), disseminated (findings shared with stakeholders), or cancelled. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: planned|inception|fieldwork|analysis|draft_report|final_report|disseminated|cancelled — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  evaluation_type varchar [note: 'Type of evaluation conducted: baseline (pre-intervention), midterm (mid-cycle), endline (post-intervention), impact (long-term outcomes), formative (process improvement), summative (final judgment), or real-time (during crisis). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: baseline|midterm|endline|impact|formative|summative|real-time — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  evaluator_type varchar [note: 'Type of evaluator conducting the assessment: internal (staff-led), external (independent consultant or firm), joint (internal and external collaboration), or participatory (beneficiary-led).']
  findings_summary varchar [note: 'Executive summary of key evaluation findings, including strengths, weaknesses, and evidence against DAC criteria.']
  geographic_coverage varchar [note: 'Geographic areas covered by the evaluation, including countries, regions, districts, or project sites. Comma-separated list or descriptive text.']
  impact_rating varchar [note: 'Rating of the program\'s impact (long-term changes and contribution to higher-level goals) per DAC criteria.']
  lead_evaluator_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead evaluator or evaluation firm responsible for conducting the evaluation.']
  lessons_learned varchar [note: 'Key lessons learned from the evaluation that can inform future program design, implementation, and organizational learning.']
  management_response_date date [note: 'Date when the management response to evaluation recommendations was formally completed and approved.']
  management_response_status varchar [note: 'Status of the management response to evaluation recommendations: pending (not yet started), in_progress (being drafted), completed (response finalized and action plan developed), or not_required.']
  methodology varchar [note: 'Description of the evaluation methodology, including data collection methods (surveys, FGD, KII, PDM, secondary data review), sampling approach, analytical techniques, and any limitations.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the evaluation record was last modified.']
  overall_rating varchar [note: 'Overall performance rating assigned by the evaluation, typically on a six-point scale aligned with donor standards (e.g., USAID, DFID).']
  planned_end_date date [note: 'Planned date when the evaluation is scheduled to be completed and final report delivered.']
  planned_start_date date [note: 'Planned date when the evaluation fieldwork or data collection is scheduled to begin.']
  purpose varchar [note: 'Primary purpose of the evaluation: accountability (donor reporting), learning (organizational improvement), decision_making (strategic planning), or compliance (regulatory requirement).']
  quality_assurance_conducted boolean [note: 'Indicates whether independent quality assurance review of the evaluation was conducted (true/false).']
  recommendations_summary varchar [note: 'Summary of actionable recommendations arising from the evaluation, including strategic, operational, and programmatic improvements.']
  relevance_rating varchar [note: 'Rating of the program\'s relevance (alignment with beneficiary needs, country priorities, and organizational strategy) per DAC criteria.']
  report_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the final evaluation report document, stored in document management system or public repository.']
  sustainability_rating varchar [note: 'Rating of the program\'s sustainability (likelihood that benefits will continue after program closure) per DAC criteria.']
  team_size varchar [note: 'Number of evaluators or team members involved in conducting the evaluation.']
  title varchar [note: 'Full descriptive title of the evaluation.']

  Note: 'Formal evaluation records including baseline, midterm, endline, and impact evaluations. Captures evaluation type (formative, summative, real-time), DAC criteria assessed (relevance, coherence, effectiveness, efficiency, impact, sustainability), methodology, evaluator (internal/external), scope, findings summary, and recommendations. Supports organizational learning and donor accountability.'
}

Table mel.evaluation_finding {
  evaluation_finding_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the evaluation finding record. Primary key.']
  action_owner_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.staff_member. Business justification: Management response tracking and corrective action monitoring require linking findings to accountable staff member. Currently text field responsible_person_name; FK enables performance tracking, workl']
  advocacy_campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to communication.advocacy_campaign. Business justification: Evidence-based findings inform advocacy campaign design and messaging. Evaluation findings on systemic issues, policy gaps, or unmet needs drive advocacy priorities and campaign content - operational ']
  award_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the grant or award that this finding pertains to, if applicable.']
  capacity_building_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.capacity_building_plan. Business justification: Evaluation findings trigger capacity building activities. Business need: corrective action planning, capacity gap closure, finding remediation tracking.']
  evaluation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent evaluation from which this finding was extracted.']
  intervention_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the program or project that this finding pertains to.']
  partner_org_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.partner_org. Business justification: Findings identify partner-specific issues requiring corrective action. Business need: partner accountability tracking, corrective action planning, performance review evidence, risk management escalati']
  partner_performance_review_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.partner_performance_review. Business justification: Evaluation findings inform performance review ratings and corrective actions. Business need: performance review evidence, improvement plan development, rating justification.']
  action_plan varchar [note: 'Detailed plan outlining the steps, resources, and timeline for implementing the recommendation.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Actual date when the recommendation was fully implemented or the issue was resolved.']
  beneficiary_category varchar [note: 'Category or segment of beneficiaries affected by or relevant to this finding (e.g., IDP, refugee, host community, women, children).']
  closure_notes varchar [note: 'Final notes or comments documenting the closure or resolution of this finding or recommendation.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level for this finding: public, internal, confidential, or restricted.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this evaluation finding record was first created in the system.']
  cross_cutting_theme varchar [note: 'Cross-cutting themes addressed by this finding (e.g., gender equality, disability inclusion, environmental sustainability, accountability).']
  dac_criterion varchar [note: 'The DAC evaluation criterion this finding relates to: relevance, coherence, effectiveness, efficiency, impact, or sustainability.']
  data_collection_method varchar [note: 'Primary method(s) used to collect evidence for this finding (e.g., Focus Group Discussion, Key Informant Interview, survey, document review, observation).']
  donor_visibility_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this finding should be included in donor-facing reports and communications (True/False).']
  evaluator_name varchar [note: 'Name of the lead evaluator or evaluation team member who documented this finding.']
  evidence_base varchar [note: 'Summary of the data sources and evidence that support this finding (e.g., FGD results, KII transcripts, PDM data, program records).']
  finding_date date [note: 'Date when the finding was formally documented or recorded in the evaluation report.']
  finding_number varchar [note: 'Sequential or hierarchical identifier for the finding within the evaluation report (e.g., F1, F2.1, Finding-03).']
  finding_statement varchar [note: 'The full text of the finding, conclusion, or recommendation as documented in the evaluation report.']
  finding_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the evaluation output: finding (observation), conclusion (interpretation), recommendation (action), lesson learned, or good practice.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic area or location(s) to which this finding applies (country, region, field office, project site).']
  implementation_progress_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage completion of the recommendation implementation (0.00 to 100.00).']
  implementation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the recommendation or corrective action: not started, in progress, partially implemented, fully implemented, closed, or rejected.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the implementation status of this finding was last reviewed or updated.']
  management_response varchar [note: 'Official response from management regarding acceptance, rejection, or modification of the recommendation.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this evaluation finding record was last modified or updated.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next review or follow-up on this finding or recommendation.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Urgency and importance assigned to the finding or recommendation: critical, high, medium, or low.']
  rating varchar [note: 'Qualitative rating assigned to the finding where applicable, using standard evaluation rating scales.']
  responsible_unit varchar [note: 'The organizational unit, department, or team responsible for addressing or implementing the recommendation.']
  risk_implication varchar [note: 'Description of risks or potential negative consequences if the finding or recommendation is not addressed.']
  sdg_alignment varchar [note: 'Sustainable Development Goal(s) that this finding relates to or impacts (e.g., SDG 1, SDG 3, SDG 5).']
  sector varchar [note: 'Humanitarian or development sector this finding relates to (e.g., WASH, health, education, protection, food security).']
  target_completion_date date [note: 'Planned or agreed date by which the recommendation should be implemented or the issue addressed.']

  Note: 'Individual findings, conclusions, and recommendations extracted from formal evaluations. Each record captures the finding statement, DAC criterion it relates to, evidence base, rating (if applicable), responsible unit for follow-up, and implementation status of the recommendation. Enables systematic learning and accountability tracking.'
}

  topic_guide_used varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the topic guide, interview protocol, or discussion guide used for the qualitative data collection.']
  translation_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether translation or interpretation services were required during the qualitative data collection.']

  Note: 'Qualitative data collection event records capturing Focus Group Discussions (FGDs), Key Informant Interviews (KIIs), case studies, and Most Significant Change (MSC) stories. Each record stores the collection method type, date, location, facilitator/interviewer, participants (count and disaggregation for FGDs, or informant role/organization for KIIs), topic guide or interview protocol used, key themes emerging, verbatim quotes, findings, consent status, and linked indicator or evaluation. Supports qualitative MEL evidence generation and triangulation with quantitative indicator data for robust program learning.'
}

  Note: 'Aggregate health and program indicator reports submitted to or received from DHIS2.   data_source varchar [note: 'Description of the primary data source or system from which evidence will be collected. May reference District Health Information System 2 (DHIS2), KoboToolbox, beneficiary surveys, or other operational systems.']
  dissemination_plan varchar [note: 'Description of how findings and lessons learned will be shared with stakeholders, including donors, partners, and internal teams. Supports knowledge management and organizational learning.']
  donor_reporting_requirement boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this learning question is explicitly required by a donor or funding agreement. True if mandated by donor conditions, false otherwise.']

  evidence_generation_method varchar [note: 'Primary methodology or data collection approach planned to answer this learning question. Includes Focus Group Discussion (FGD), Key Informant Interview (KII), Post-Distribution Monitoring (PDM), and other Monitoring Evaluation and Learning (MEL) methods. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: quantitative_survey|qualitative_interview|focus_group_discussion|key_informant_interview|post_distribution_monitoring|case_study|mixed_methods|secondary_data_analysis|participatory_assessment — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  findings_summary varchar [note: 'High-level summary of key findings, insights, or answers generated in response to this learning question. Populated upon completion of evidence generation and analysis.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic area or operational context where evidence generation activities will take place. May reference country offices, project sites, or regions aligned with Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs (OCHA) classifications.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the staff member who last updated this learning agenda record. Supports change tracking and accountability.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this learning agenda record was last modified. Supports audit trail and version control.']
  learning_agenda_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this learning agenda item. Tracks progression from planning through evidence generation to completion. Supports Monitoring Evaluation Accountability and Learning (MEAL) accountability. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|approved|in_progress|data_collection|analysis|completed|on_hold|cancelled — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  learning_question_identifier varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code or number assigned to this learning question for tracking and reporting purposes. Format: LQ- followed by alphanumeric code.']
  learning_question_text varchar [note: 'The full text of the priority learning question or knowledge gap that this agenda item seeks to address. Defines the core inquiry driving evidence generation.']
  learning_question_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the learning question based on the Development Assistance Committee (DAC) evaluation criteria or Results-Based Management (RBM) framework. Indicates the dimension of program performance being examined.']
  planned_completion_date date [note: 'Target date by which evidence generation and analysis for this learning question should be completed. Critical for adaptive management and donor reporting cycles.']
  planned_start_date date [note: 'Planned date when evidence generation activities for this learning question will begin. Aligns with program cycle or strategic period timeline.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Relative priority or urgency assigned to this learning question within the overall learning agenda. Informs resource allocation and sequencing decisions.']
  rationale varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of why this learning question is a priority, including the evidence gap, strategic importance, and expected contribution to adaptive management or organizational learning.']
  recommendations varchar [note: 'Actionable recommendations or programmatic adjustments proposed based on the evidence generated. Supports adaptive management and continuous improvement.']
  responsible_team varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the organizational unit, department, or team responsible for generating evidence and answering this learning question. May reference Monitoring Evaluation and Learning (MEL) team, program team, or research unit.']
  sdg_alignment varchar [note: 'Reference to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goal(s) (SDG) that this learning question contributes to or informs. Supports global development reporting.']
  target_population varchar [note: 'Description of the population, stakeholder group, or unit of analysis from which evidence will be collected. May include beneficiaries, Persons of Concern (PoC), Internally Displaced Persons (IDP), community members, or program staff.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the staff member who created this learning agenda record. Supports audit trail and accountability.']

  Note: 'Organizational and program-level learning agenda records defining priority learning questions, evidence gaps, and knowledge management objectives for a program cycle or strategic period. Captures learning question, rationale, linked indicator or evaluation, responsible team, timeline, and status of evidence generation. Supports MEAL accountability and adaptive management.'
}

  capacity_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.capacity_assessment. Business justification: Capacity assessment tools are a type of data collection tool. Business need: assessment standardization, tool version control, methodology documentation.']
  intervention_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the program to which this data collection tool is linked.']

  partner_org_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.partner_org. Business justification: Tools deployed by/for partners in sub-award contexts. Business need: partner data collection coordination, tool standardization across partners, data quality protocol enforcement.']
  primary_data_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member who approved the data collection tool.']

  safeguarding_risk_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to safeguarding.risk_assessment. Business justification: Data collection tools (surveys, FGDs, KIIs) involving beneficiaries require safeguarding risk assessments to identify risks (power dynamics, retraumatization, child safeguarding) and embed mitigation.']
  system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: Tools are deployed on specific platforms (KoboToolbox, CommCare, ODK). Essential for platform licensing management, integration configuration, deployment planning, and troubleshooting data collection ']
  additional_languages varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of ISO 639 language codes for additional languages supported by the tool.']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the data collection tool was approved for deployment.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval status of the data collection tool by MEL or program management.']
  consent_mechanism varchar [note: 'Method by which informed consent is obtained from respondents using this tool.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this data collection tool record was first created in the system.']
  data_collection_method varchar [note: 'Primary methodology employed by this tool. FGD (Focus Group Discussion), PDM (Post-Distribution Monitoring). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: survey|interview|fgd|observation|pdm|assessment|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  data_protection_compliance varchar [note: 'Data protection and privacy framework to which this tool adheres. GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation), DPA (Data Protection Act), CHS (Core Humanitarian Standard).']
  data_quality_validation_rules varchar [note: 'Description or reference to validation rules embedded in the tool to ensure data quality at point of collection.']
  deployment_end_date date [note: 'Date on which the data collection tool was retired or deactivated from field use.']
  deployment_start_date date [note: 'Date on which the data collection tool was first deployed or made active in the field.']
  estimated_completion_time_minutes varchar [note: 'Expected time in minutes required to complete the data collection tool.']
  ethical_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of ethical review or institutional review board (IRB) approval for the data collection tool.']
  external_tool_url varchar [note: 'URL or hyperlink to the external platform where the tool is hosted or accessed.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Geographic deployment scope of the tool, such as country, region, or project site identifiers.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this data collection tool record was last updated or modified.']
  linked_indicator_ids varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of indicator IDs that this tool is designed to measure or collect data for.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes or comments about the data collection tool.']
  primary_language varchar [note: 'ISO 639 language code for the primary language of the data collection tool.']
  question_count varchar [note: 'Total number of questions or data fields in the collection tool.']
  respondent_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the target respondent or data subject for this collection tool. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: beneficiary|household|community_leader|key_informant|staff|partner|other — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  revision_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or justification for the most recent revision or version update of the tool.']
  tool_code varchar [note: 'Unique business identifier code for the data collection tool, used for external reference and integration.']
  tool_documentation_url varchar [note: 'URL or reference to documentation, user guides, or training materials for the data collection tool.']
  tool_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name of the data collection tool or instrument.']
  tool_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the data collection tool.']
  tool_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the data collection tool by format and platform.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the data collection tool following semantic versioning convention.']

  Note: 'Registry of MEL data collection instruments including KoboToolbox/ODK forms, CommCare modules, DHIS2 data entry forms, and structured interview guides. Each record captures tool name, version number, linked indicator(s), deployment platform, language(s), target respondent type, geographic deployment scope, approval status, and active/retired lifecycle state. Ensures instrument governance, version control, and traceability from collected data back to the authorized collection tool.'
}

Table mel.mel_needs_assessment {
  mel_needs_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the needs assessment record. Primary key.']
  advocacy_campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to communication.advocacy_campaign. Business justification: Needs assessment data drives advocacy campaign targeting and messaging. GAM rates, unmet needs, and vulnerability data inform advocacy priorities and campaign design - direct operational link between ']
  award_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the grant or funding source that financed this needs assessment.']
  country_office_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the country office or field office responsible for conducting the needs assessment.']
  crisis_communication_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to communication.crisis_communication. Business justification: Emergency needs assessments trigger crisis communications activation. Rapid assessments showing acute needs or deteriorating conditions initiate donor alerts, media engagement, and emergency appeals -']
  intervention_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the program or project that commissioned or will use this needs assessment to inform design and resource allocation.']
  partner_org_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to partnership.partner_org. Business justification: Assessments conducted by or with partners. Business need: partner capacity assessment, joint needs analysis, partnership scope definition, sub-award design.']
  primary_mel_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member who led the needs assessment field team and is responsible for data quality.']
  admin_level_1 varchar [note: 'First-level administrative division (e.g., state, province, region) where the assessment was conducted.']
  admin_level_2 varchar [note: 'Second-level administrative division (e.g., district, county) where the assessment was conducted.']
  assessment_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the needs assessment, used in donor reports and field communications.']
  assessment_end_date date [note: 'Date when field data collection for the needs assessment was completed.']
  assessment_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title of the needs assessment.']
  assessment_start_date date [note: 'Date when field data collection for the needs assessment began.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the needs assessment. Planned indicates scheduled but not started; in_progress indicates field data collection underway; completed indicates data collection finished; validated indicates findings reviewed and approved; cancelled indicates assessment was terminated.']
  assessment_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the needs assessment methodology and scope. Rapid assessments are quick field surveys; comprehensive assessments are in-depth multi-sector analyses; sectoral assessments focus on one domain (WASH, health, nutrition); baseline and endline assessments measure program impact at start and end.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the primary country where the needs assessment was conducted.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the needs assessment record was first created in the system.']
  dac_sector_code varchar [note: 'OECD Development Assistance Committee 5-digit sector code classifying the primary sector focus of the needs assessment (e.g., 12240 for Basic Nutrition, 14030 for Basic Water Supply).']
  data_collection_method varchar [note: 'Primary method(s) used to collect needs assessment data (e.g., household surveys, Key Informant Interviews (KII), Focus Group Discussions (FGD), direct observation, secondary data review). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: household_survey|kii|fgd|direct_observation|secondary_data|mobile_data_collection|remote_sensing — promote to reference product]']
  data_collection_tool varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the digital or paper tool used for data collection (e.g., KoboToolbox form ID, ODK survey name, paper questionnaire version).']
  education_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of education and learning needs identified in the assessment.']
  external_report_url varchar [note: 'URL link to the published needs assessment report or dataset on external platforms (e.g., Humanitarian Data Exchange, ReliefWeb, organizational website).']
  gam_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of children under 5 years with Global Acute Malnutrition (weight-for-height Z-score < -2 or Mid-Upper Arm Circumference (MUAC) < 125mm or bilateral pitting edema) identified in the assessment. GAM rates above 15% indicate a critical nutrition emergency.']
  geographic_scope varchar [note: 'Textual description of the geographic area covered by the needs assessment (e.g., district names, province, refugee camp, urban settlement).']
  health_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of health service and medical needs identified in the assessment.']
  households_assessed varchar [note: 'Total number of households surveyed or included in the needs assessment sample.']
  key_findings_summary varchar [note: 'Executive summary of the most critical findings and needs identified in the assessment, used for donor reporting and program design.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the needs assessment record was last updated in the system.']
  muac_screening_count varchar [note: 'Number of children screened using Mid-Upper Arm Circumference (MUAC) measurement during the needs assessment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional contextual notes, caveats, or operational constraints relevant to the needs assessment (e.g., access limitations, security incidents during data collection, data quality issues).']
  nutrition_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of nutrition and food security needs identified in the assessment.']
  population_assessed varchar [note: 'Total number of individuals in the target population covered by the needs assessment.']
  protection_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of protection needs including Gender-Based Violence (GBV), child protection, and psychosocial support identified in the assessment.']
  recommendations varchar [note: 'Programmatic recommendations and proposed interventions based on the needs assessment findings.']
  sam_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of children under 5 years with Severe Acute Malnutrition (weight-for-height Z-score < -3 or MUAC < 115mm or bilateral pitting edema) identified in the assessment. SAM rates above 2% indicate a critical nutrition emergency.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of respondents or data points collected during the needs assessment.']
  sampling_method varchar [note: 'Statistical sampling methodology used to select respondents for the needs assessment.']
  sdg_alignment varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of United Nations Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) numbers that this needs assessment informs (e.g., SDG 1 No Poverty, SDG 2 Zero Hunger, SDG 6 Clean Water and Sanitation).']
  shelter_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of shelter and housing needs identified in the assessment.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the operational system or platform from which the needs assessment data was extracted (e.g., KoboToolbox, DHIS2, CommCare, Humanitarian OpenStreetMap).']
  validation_date date [note: 'Date when the needs assessment findings were validated and approved for use in program design and donor reporting.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Status of the needs assessment data validation and quality assurance review process.']
  wash_needs_priority varchar [note: 'Priority ranking of Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene needs identified in the assessment. Critical indicates immediate life-threatening gaps; high indicates urgent but not immediately life-threatening; medium and low indicate longer-term development needs.']

  Note: 'Formal needs assessment records capturing structured analysis of humanitarian or development needs in a target population or geography. Stores assessment type (rapid, comprehensive, sectoral), methodology, geographic scope, population size assessed, key findings by sector (WASH, nutrition, health, shelter), GAM/SAM rates where applicable, MUAC screening results, and priority needs ranking. Informs program design and resource allocation.'
}

  corrective_action_completion_date date [note: 'The actual date when corrective actions were completed.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'The target date by which corrective actions should be completed.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the implementation of corrective actions (e.g., not started, in progress, completed, verified, overdue).']
