  commitment_8_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Conformity rating for CHS Commitment 8 (Staff are supported to do their job effectively and are treated fairly and equitably): numeric score from 1.00 (non-conforming) to 5.00 (fully conforming).']
  commitment_9_assessor_notes varchar [note: 'Assessor observations, findings, and rationale for the conformity rating assigned to CHS Commitment 9.']
  commitment_9_evidence varchar [note: 'Summary of evidence provided to support the conformity rating for CHS Commitment 9, including documentation references and examples.']
  commitment_9_improvement_actions varchar [note: 'Recommended improvement actions and corrective measures to enhance conformity with CHS Commitment 9.']
  commitment_9_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Conformity rating for CHS Commitment 9 (Resources are managed and used responsibly for their intended purpose): numeric score from 1.00 (non-conforming) to 5.00 (fully conforming).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this CHS self-assessment record was first created in the system.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this CHS self-assessment record was last updated.']
  lead_assessor_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the lead assessor for assessment coordination and communication.']
  lead_assessor_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the lead assessor responsible for coordinating the CHS self-assessment process.']
  next_assessment_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next CHS self-assessment cycle, typically 12-24 months after the current assessment.']
  overall_conformity_rating varchar [note: 'Aggregate conformity rating across all nine CHS commitments: non-conforming (significant gaps), partially conforming (some evidence), largely conforming (most requirements met), fully conforming (all requirements met), not assessed (assessment incomplete).']
  overall_conformity_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric overall conformity score calculated as the average of all commitment ratings, typically on a scale of 1.00 to 5.00.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date when the completed self-assessment was formally submitted to the CHS Alliance or verification body.']
  verification_body varchar [note: 'Name of the CHS Alliance-approved verification body or independent auditor that conducted third-party verification, if applicable.']
  verification_date date [note: 'Date when third-party verification of the self-assessment was completed, if applicable.']

  Note: 'Master record of Core Humanitarian Standard (CHS) self-assessment cycles including per-commitment conformity ratings. Captures assessment period, methodology (internal, peer review, third-party verification), CHS Alliance verification body, overall conformity rating, scope (organizational, country office, program), lead assessor, and submission date. Includes granular ratings for each of the nine CHS commitments: commitment number, performance indicator, evidence provided, rating score (1-5), assessor notes, and improvement actions. Enables tracking of humanitarian accountability standards compliance and progress toward CHS certification.'
}

Table compliance.iati_publication {
  iati_publication_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the IATI publication record. Primary key for tracking individual publication events to the IATI Registry.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation. Business justification: IATI publications satisfy transparency and accountability obligations (IATI reporting requirements). The obligation table tracks that iati_publication_required flag. One publication satisfies one obli']
  partner_org_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the organization entity that owns this IATI publication. Links to the master organization record.']
  publishing_system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: IATI publications are generated from and published through specific platforms (grants management system, IATI publisher tool). Nonprofits track which system produced each publication for data quality ']
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_filing. Business justification: IATI publications to the IATI Registry are a specialized type of regulatory filing. One IATI publication is one filing; one filing is one publication. Publication metadata (date, timestamp, URL, file ']
  superseded_by_publication_iati_publication_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the newer IATI publication that replaces this record. Null if this is the current active publication.']
  activity_count varchar [note: 'Total number of IATI activity records included in this publication. Used for completeness validation and registry statistics.']
  completeness_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of recommended IATI fields populated across all activities in this publication. Measures adherence to IATI best practices for comprehensive reporting.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'Username or identifier of the staff member who initiated this IATI publication. Used for accountability and change management.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this IATI publication record was first created in the system. Used for audit trail and publication history analysis.']
  data_quality_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite score (0-100) assessing completeness and accuracy of IATI data elements based on IATI Dashboard methodology. Higher scores indicate better data quality.']
  donor_requirement_compliance varchar [note: 'Assessment of whether this publication meets specific IATI transparency requirements mandated by major donors (USAID, FCDO, DAC members). Used for grant compliance reporting.']
  file_size_bytes varchar [note: 'Size of the published IATI XML file in bytes. Used for technical monitoring and registry performance optimization.']
  iati_organization_identifier varchar [note: 'The globally unique IATI organization identifier assigned by the IATI Registry. Format follows IATI standard: country code, registration agency, and registration number (e.g., US-EIN-123456789).']
  iati_version varchar [note: 'The version of the IATI Standard used for this publication (e.g., 2.03, 2.02, 1.05). Determines schema validation rules and available fields.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this IATI publication record. Tracks changes to metadata or file content after initial publication.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for internal notes about this publication, including special circumstances, data quality issues, or donor-specific requirements addressed.']
  publication_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this IATI publication. Published indicates active availability on the registry; superseded indicates replacement by a newer version.']
  publication_type varchar [note: 'Type of IATI file published: organization-level file containing organizational metadata, or activity-level file containing individual project/program records.']
  publisher_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the organizational contact responsible for this IATI publication. Used for data quality inquiries and registry communications.']
  recipient_country_count varchar [note: 'Number of distinct recipient countries covered by activities in this publication. Indicates geographic scope of transparency reporting.']
  registry_dataset_code varchar [note: 'Unique dataset identifier assigned by the IATI Registry system. Used for programmatic access via IATI Registry API.']
  reporting_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code used for financial values in this publication (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All monetary amounts are expressed in this currency.']
  reporting_period_end_date date [note: 'The end date of the reporting period covered by this IATI publication. Used to assess data currency and timeliness compliance.']
  reporting_period_start_date date [note: 'The start date of the reporting period covered by this IATI publication. Defines the temporal scope of activities and financial data included.']
  sector_count varchar [note: 'Number of distinct Development Assistance Committee (DAC) sector codes represented in this publication. Indicates thematic diversity of reported activities.']
  timeliness_category varchar [note: 'Qualitative assessment of publication timeliness based on the timeliness score. Used for donor reporting and transparency benchmarking.']
  timeliness_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Calculated score (0-100) measuring how current the published data is relative to the reporting period end date. Higher scores indicate more timely transparency reporting.']
  total_budget_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate budget value across all activities included in this publication, in the organization\'s reporting currency. Provides summary financial transparency metric.']
  total_disbursement_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate actual disbursement value across all activities in this publication, in the organization\'s reporting currency. Represents total funds deployed during the reporting period.']
  validation_error_count varchar [note: 'Number of schema validation errors detected in the published IATI file. Zero indicates full technical compliance with the IATI Standard.']
  validation_warning_count varchar [note: 'Number of non-critical warnings identified during IATI validation. Warnings indicate recommended improvements but do not prevent publication.']

  Note: 'Master record of IATI (International Aid Transparency Initiative) publications to the IATI Registry, covering both organization-level files and individual activity records. Tracks IATI organization identifier, publication date, registry URL, file type, IATI version, timeliness score, and per-activity detail including IATI activity identifier, title, status, dates, recipient countries, DAC sector codes, budgets, and disbursements. Supports compliance with IATI Standard and donor transparency requirements from USAID, FCDO, and DAC members.'
}

Table compliance.governance_policy {
  governance_policy_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the governance policy record. Primary key.']
  document_system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: Governance policies are managed in document management or governance platforms for version control, approval workflow, and access management. Nonprofits track which system houses each policy for board']
  psea_policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to safeguarding.psea_policy. Business justification: Board governance policies reference and approve organizational PSEA policies. Real business process: board oversight and policy approval where governance resolutions formally adopt PSEA policies and t']
  superseded_by_policy_governance_policy_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the governance policy that supersedes this document. Used to track policy version lineage when a new version replaces an older one. Null if this is the current active version.']
  annual_certification_status varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: the status of the annual COI certification requirement for the disclosing party. Indicates whether the annual disclosure has been completed, is pending, is overdue, or is not required for this document type.']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the approving authority formally approved the governance policy or resolution.']
  approving_authority varchar [note: 'The governing body or individual who formally approved the policy. Typically the Board of Directors, Executive Director, or designated committee.']
  certification_date date [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: the date on which the disclosing party signed the annual COI certification. Null for non-COI documents or uncertified disclosures.']
  compliance_framework varchar [note: 'The external regulatory or industry standard framework that the governance policy is designed to satisfy (e.g., IRS 501(c)(3), Charity Commission, Core Humanitarian Standard, GDPR, OMB Uniform Guidance 2 CFR 200).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this governance policy record was first created in the system.']
  disclosing_party varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: the name of the board member, officer, or key employee making the disclosure. Null for non-COI documents.']
  document_owner varchar [note: 'The department, role, or individual responsible for maintaining, updating, and ensuring compliance with the governance policy.']
  document_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the governance document type. Distinguishes between organizational policies, board resolutions, bylaws, charters, conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures, and internal control frameworks.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'The file path or URL where the full governance policy document is stored in the organization\'s document management system or cloud storage.']
  effective_date date [note: 'The date on which the governance policy becomes binding and enforceable within the organization.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'The date on which the governance policy ceases to be effective or is scheduled for mandatory review. Nullable for policies without a defined expiration.']
  governance_policy_category varchar [note: 'The functional category or domain of the governance policy. Includes financial management, human resources (HR), safeguarding, anti-fraud, data protection, and conflict-of-interest (COI) policies.']
  governance_policy_description varchar [note: 'A detailed narrative description of the governance policy\'s purpose, scope, and key provisions.']
  governance_policy_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the governance policy. Indicates whether the document is in draft, active and enforceable, under review for revision, superseded by a newer version, or archived.']
  irs_990_disclosure_required boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this governance policy or resolution must be disclosed on the organization\'s IRS Form 990 (Schedule O or Part VI).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'The date on which the governance policy was most recently reviewed by the responsible authority.']
  meeting_date date [note: 'For board resolutions: the date of the board or committee meeting at which the resolution was passed. Null for non-resolution documents.']
  meeting_type varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the type of meeting at which the resolution was passed (regular, special, annual, or emergency). Null for non-resolution documents.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this governance policy record was last modified or updated in the system.']
  nature_of_conflict varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: a description of the nature and circumstances of the potential or actual conflict of interest. Null for non-COI documents.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'The scheduled date for the next mandatory review of the governance policy.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes, comments, or context related to the governance policy, resolution, or disclosure. Used for internal documentation and audit trail purposes.']
  policy_name varchar [note: 'The official name or title of the governance policy, resolution, bylaw, or charter document.']
  policy_number varchar [note: 'The unique business identifier or reference number assigned to the governance document for tracking and citation purposes.']
  public_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this governance policy is publicly available or must be disclosed to donors, regulators, or the public under transparency requirements.']
  recusal_decision varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: whether the disclosing party recused themselves from decision-making related to the conflict. Null for non-COI documents.']
  related_party varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: the name of the related party (individual, organization, or entity) involved in the conflict. Null for non-COI documents.']
  resolution_number varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the unique sequential identifier assigned to the resolution for tracking and reference. Null for non-resolution documents.']
  resolution_text varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the full text of the resolution as recorded in the meeting minutes. Null for non-resolution documents.']
  review_cycle_months varchar [note: 'The frequency in months at which the governance policy is scheduled for mandatory review and potential revision.']
  review_outcome varchar [note: 'For conflict-of-interest (COI) disclosures: the outcome of the board or committee review of the disclosed conflict (approved with safeguards, mitigated through controls, prohibited transaction, or still under review). Null for non-COI documents.']
  scope varchar [note: 'The organizational units, geographic regions, or functional areas to which the governance policy applies.']
  version varchar [note: 'The version number or identifier of the governance document, tracking revisions and updates over time.']
  vote_outcome varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the outcome of the vote on the resolution (passed, failed, tabled for future consideration, or withdrawn). Null for non-resolution documents.']
  votes_abstained varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the number of board members who abstained from voting on the resolution. Null for non-resolution documents.']
  votes_against varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the number of votes cast against the resolution. Null for non-resolution documents.']
  votes_for varchar [note: 'For board resolutions: the number of votes cast in favor of the resolution. Null for non-resolution documents.']

  Note: 'Master catalog of organizational governance documents including board-approved policies, bylaws, board resolutions, charters, conflict-of-interest disclosures, and internal control frameworks. Captures document type (policy, resolution, bylaw, charter, COI disclosure), name, category (financial, HR, safeguarding, anti-fraud, data protection, COI), version, effective/expiry dates, approving authority, document owner, review cycle. For resolutions: meeting date, meeting type, resolution text, vote outcome, and resolution number. For COI disclosures: disclosing party, nature of conflict, related party, recusal decision, review outcome, and annual certification status. Supports IRS 990 Schedule O and Part VI governance disclosures, Charity Commission annual returns, and donor due diligence.'
}

Table compliance.donor_requirement {

Business justification: Donor reporting requirements are fulfilled through specific platforms (grants management systems, donor portals, reporting tools). Nonprofits must track which system fulfills each requirement for work']
  modified_by_user_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who last modified this compliance requirement record, used for audit trail and accountability.']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation. Business justification: Donor-specific compliance requirements are instances of broader compliance obligations. One donor requirement maps to one obligation in the master catalog; one obligation may be driven by multiple don']
  staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the staff member assigned primary responsibility for ensuring compliance with this requirement.']
  actual_effort_hours decimal(10,2) [note: 'The actual number of staff hours expended in fulfilling this compliance requirement, used for future planning and cost analysis.']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the donor formally approved or accepted the compliance submission.']
  associated_cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'The direct financial cost incurred to fulfill this compliance requirement, including consultant fees, audit costs, or system expenses.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the organization\'s compliance with this requirement, tracking progress from initiation through approval or waiver. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: not_started|in_progress|submitted|under_review|approved|overdue|waived — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the associated cost amount.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this compliance requirement record was first created in the system.']
  deliverable_format varchar [note: 'The required format or medium for the compliance deliverable, such as PDF report, online portal submission, or physical document.']
  donor_contact_email varchar [note: 'The email address of the donor representative responsible for receiving and reviewing compliance submissions.']
  donor_contact_name varchar [note: 'The name of the donor representative or point of contact for questions and submissions related to this compliance requirement.']
  due_date date [note: 'The date by which the compliance requirement must be fulfilled and submitted to the donor.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'The date on which this compliance requirement expires or is no longer applicable, typically aligned with grant closure.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which this compliance requirement becomes active and applicable to the grant.']
  estimated_effort_hours decimal(10,2) [note: 'The estimated number of staff hours required to complete and submit this compliance requirement.']
  internal_policy_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the organization\'s internal policy or procedure document that governs how this compliance requirement is fulfilled.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The date and time when this compliance requirement record was last updated or modified.']
  non_compliance_consequence varchar [note: 'Description of the potential consequences or penalties for failing to meet this compliance requirement, such as grant suspension, fund recovery, or donor relationship damage.']
  non_compliance_risk_level varchar [note: 'The assessed risk level to the organization if this compliance requirement is not met, considering financial, reputational, and operational impacts.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes, comments, or context related to this compliance requirement, used for internal coordination and knowledge sharing.']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'The urgency and importance level assigned to this compliance requirement, used for resource allocation and risk management.']
  related_regulation_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulatory framework, law, or standard that underpins this donor requirement, such as OMB 2 CFR 200, IATI, or CHS.']
  requirement_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the compliance requirement, including specific obligations, deliverables, and conditions imposed by the donor.']
  requirement_reference_number varchar [note: 'External reference number or code assigned by the donor to this compliance requirement, used for tracking and correspondence.']
  requirement_title varchar [note: 'Short descriptive title of the compliance requirement for quick identification and reporting.']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'The organizational department or unit responsible for managing and fulfilling this compliance requirement.']
  submission_date date [note: 'The actual date on which the compliance deliverable was submitted to the donor.']
  submission_method varchar [note: 'The channel or mechanism through which the compliance deliverable must be submitted to the donor.']
  supporting_document_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to supporting documentation, templates, or guidance materials related to this compliance requirement.']
  waiver_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the donor has approved a waiver or exemption for this compliance requirement.']
  waiver_justification varchar [note: 'The rationale or explanation provided for requesting a waiver from this compliance requirement.']
  waiver_requested_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the organization has formally requested a waiver or exemption from this compliance requirement.']

  Note: 'Master record of specific compliance requirements imposed by individual institutional donors (USAID, DFID, EU, UN agencies) on grants awarded to the organization. Captures donor name, grant reference, requirement type (financial reporting, programmatic reporting, audit, visibility, procurement rules, anti-terrorism certification, NICRA application), requirement description, due date, and compliance status. Distinct from general regulatory obligations — these are donor-specific contractual compliance conditions.'
}

Table compliance.compliance_incident {
  compliance_incident_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the compliance incident record. Primary key.']
  affected_country_office_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the country office or field location where the incident occurred.']
  award_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the grant or funding award affected by the incident. Critical for donor notification obligations.']
  intervention_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the program where the incident occurred or was detected. Links to program master data.']
  it_incident_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.it_incident. Business justification: Compliance incidents (fraud, data breach, misconduct) often trigger or relate to IT security incidents. Nonprofits must link these for coordinated investigation, root cause analysis, and integrated co']
  allegation_category varchar [note: 'Specific category of the allegation within the broader incident type. Supports detailed classification for MEL and donor reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: corruption|theft|misappropriation|conflict_of_interest|harassment|discrimination|safeguarding_violation|data_breach|regulatory_noncompliance — 9 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  corrective_action_taken varchar [note: 'Summary of corrective actions, disciplinary measures, or process improvements implemented in response to the incident.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this incident record was first created in the system.']
  donor_notification_date date [note: 'Date when the donor was formally notified of the incident per contractual obligations.']
  donor_notification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incident meets donor notification thresholds per grant agreements. True if notification is required.']
  estimated_financial_impact_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated financial loss or exposure in US Dollars resulting from the incident. Used for materiality assessment and donor reporting thresholds.']
  incident_date date [note: 'Date when the alleged incident or violation occurred. May be approximate if exact date is unknown.']
  incident_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the incident, allegations, and circumstances. Confidential to protect investigation and individuals.']
  incident_number varchar [note: 'Externally-visible unique incident reference number used for tracking and donor reporting. Format: INC-YYYYMMDD.']
  incident_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the incident in the investigation and resolution workflow.']
  incident_type varchar [note: 'Primary classification of the compliance incident. Determines investigation protocol and reporting obligations.']
  investigation_assigned_to varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the investigator or investigation team assigned to the case. Confidential to protect investigation integrity.']
  investigation_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the investigation was formally closed and findings documented.']
  investigation_finding varchar [note: 'Final determination of the investigation regarding the validity of the allegation. Confidential until disclosure obligations are met.']
  investigation_notes varchar [note: 'Internal notes and observations from the investigation process. Confidential working document.']
  investigation_start_date date [note: 'Date when formal investigation was initiated following triage and preliminary assessment.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier of the person who last modified this incident record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this incident record was last updated.']
  lessons_learned varchar [note: 'Key lessons and insights captured from the incident for organizational learning and process improvement per MEL framework.']
  public_disclosure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incident and its resolution have been publicly disclosed per transparency commitments. True if disclosed.']
  regulatory_report_date date [note: 'Date when the incident was reported to the relevant regulatory authority.']
  regulatory_reporting_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the incident must be reported to regulatory authorities (Charity Commission, IRS, OCHA). True if reporting is required.']
  related_incident_ids varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of related or linked incident IDs if this incident is part of a pattern or connected to other cases.']
  reported_date date [note: 'Date when the incident was first reported to the organization through any channel.']
  reporter_anonymity_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reporter requested anonymity or submitted the report anonymously. True if anonymous.']
  reporter_contact_info varchar [note: 'Contact information for the reporter if they provided it and did not request anonymity. Used for follow-up and feedback.']
  reporting_channel varchar [note: 'Channel or mechanism through which the incident was reported to the organization. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: internal_detection|anonymous_hotline|whistleblower_portal|donor_notification|beneficiary_complaint|partner_report|audit_finding — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when all corrective actions were completed and the incident was formally closed.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Assessed severity of the incident based on impact to beneficiaries, financial exposure, reputational risk, and regulatory implications.']
  triage_outcome varchar [note: 'Initial triage decision determining the handling pathway for the reported incident.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User or system identifier of the person who created this incident record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of compliance incidents, violations, near-misses, and whistleblower reports identified within the organization. Covers fraud allegations, financial mismanagement, procurement irregularities, data protection violations, and ethical breaches reported through any channel (internal detection, anonymous hotline, donor notification, whistleblower portal). Captures incident date, type, severity, affected program/grant, reporting channel, reporter anonymity flag, allegation category, investigation status, triage outcome, and resolution. Supports mandatory donor incident reporting, HAP accountability, CHS Commitment 5, and organizational disclosure obligations.'
}

Table compliance.nicra_agreement {
  nicra_agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the NICRA agreement record. Primary key.']
  cognizant_agency_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the federal agency responsible for negotiating and approving this NICRA (typically USAID, DHHS, or other federal agency).']
  obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.obligation. Business justification: NICRA agreements satisfy the compliance obligation to negotiate and maintain indirect cost rate agreements with cognizant federal agencies. One NICRA satisfies one obligation instance; one obligation ']
  primary_predecessor_agreement_nicra_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the previous NICRA agreement that this agreement supersedes or replaces. Enables tracking of NICRA history and rate evolution over time.']
  regulatory_filing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_filing. Business justification: NICRA (Negotiated Indirect Cost Rate Agreement) submissions to cognizant agencies are regulatory filings. One NICRA agreement has one filing submission; one filing is for one NICRA. Submission and app']
  agreement_number varchar [note: 'The official agreement number assigned by the cognizant agency to this NICRA. This is the externally-known identifier used in grant reporting and audit documentation.']
  applicable_programs varchar [note: 'Description of the federal programs, grants, or awards to which this NICRA applies. May specify all federal awards or list specific programs, agencies, or award types covered by this agreement.']
  audit_findings_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to any Single Audit or A-133 audit findings related to indirect cost rate compliance that informed this NICRA negotiation or require corrective action.']
  cognizant_agency_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the cognizant agency contact for correspondence regarding this NICRA.']
  cognizant_agency_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person at the cognizant agency responsible for this NICRA negotiation and oversight.']
  cognizant_agency_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the cognizant agency contact for inquiries regarding this NICRA.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes regarding compliance requirements, special conditions, or operational guidance for applying this NICRA to federal awards.']
  cost_base_type varchar [note: 'The cost base to which the indirect cost rate is applied: MTDC (Modified Total Direct Costs, excluding capital expenditures, equipment, subawards over $25K, and other exclusions per 2 CFR 200.68), TDC (Total Direct Costs), salaries_and_wages, or direct_salaries.']
  cost_pool_definition varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the Facilities and Administration (F&A) cost pools included in the indirect cost rate calculation, such as general administration, facilities operation and maintenance, depreciation, and other allowable indirect costs per 2 CFR 200 Appendix IV.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this NICRA agreement record was first created in the system.']
  de_minimis_rate_elected boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the organization elected to use the de minimis indirect cost rate of 10% of MTDC as permitted under 2 CFR 200.414(f) for organizations that have never received a negotiated indirect cost rate. True if de minimis rate is elected, False otherwise.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'The date on which this NICRA expires. Nullable for open-ended agreements pending final rate determination.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'The date from which this NICRA becomes effective and the negotiated indirect cost rates may be applied to federal awards.']
  exclusions_and_limitations varchar [note: 'Any exclusions, limitations, or special conditions imposed by the cognizant agency on the use of this NICRA, such as caps on specific cost categories, excluded programs, or required cost allocation adjustments.']
  fiscal_year_basis varchar [note: 'The organization\'s fiscal year period on which the indirect cost rate calculation is based (e.g., \'July 1 - June 30\', \'January 1 - December 31\'). Critical for aligning rate application with organizational accounting periods.']
  fringe_benefit_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The negotiated fringe benefit rate percentage applied to salaries and wages to calculate employee benefits costs. May be included in the NICRA if fringe is treated as an indirect cost pool.']
  indirect_cost_rate_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The negotiated indirect cost rate expressed as a percentage (e.g., 15.50 for 15.50%). This is the primary rate applied to the cost base to calculate Facilities and Administration (F&A) costs recoverable from federal awards.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this NICRA agreement record was last modified in the system.']
  negotiation_date date [note: 'The date on which the indirect cost rate negotiation with the cognizant agency was completed and the NICRA was formally executed.']
  nicra_agreement_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the NICRA: draft (being prepared), pending_approval (submitted to cognizant agency), active (in effect), expired (past effective period), superseded (replaced by newer NICRA), or terminated (cancelled before expiry).']
  organizational_unit_applicability varchar [note: 'Specifies which organizational units, divisions, or legal entities within the nonprofit organization this NICRA applies to. Important for multi-entity organizations with separate NICRAs for different subsidiaries or country offices.']
  rate_adjustment_provision varchar [note: 'Description of any provisions for rate adjustments, carry-forward of under/over-recoveries, or reconciliation requirements specified in the NICRA.']
  supporting_documentation_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the supporting documentation submitted with the indirect cost rate proposal, including cost allocation plans, financial statements, audit reports, and other materials required by the cognizant agency.']

  Note: 'Master record of Negotiated Indirect Cost Rate Agreements (NICRAs) between the organization and its US federal cognizant agency (typically USAID or DHHS). Captures NICRA effective date, expiry date, cognizant agency, indirect cost rate type (predetermined, fixed, provisional, final), rate percentage, base type (MTDC, TDC, salaries), applicable programs, and F&A (Facilities and Administration) cost pool definitions. Critical for US federal grant financial compliance under 2 CFR 200.'
}

Table compliance.statutory_registration {
  statutory_registration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the statutory registration record. Primary key for this entity.']
  registration_system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: Statutory registration data (legal entity information, tax status, operating authority) is maintained in legal entity management or ERP systems. Nonprofits track which system is the source of truth fo']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status with the reporting and operational requirements of this registration. Compliant indicates all requirements met; Non-compliant indicates violations or missed filings; Under Review indicates regulatory audit or investigation in progress; Remediation Required indicates corrective action needed.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this statutory registration record was first created in the system.']
  deductibility_code varchar [note: 'IRS deductibility code indicating the extent to which contributions are tax-deductible (e.g., PC for public charity, PF for private foundation). Applicable primarily to US 501(c)(3) registrations.']
  determination_letter_date date [note: 'Date of the official determination letter or registration certificate issued by the regulatory authority. Particularly relevant for US 501(c)(3) IRS determination letters.']
  doing_business_as_name varchar [note: 'Alternative operating name or trade name used by the organization, if different from the registered legal name.']
  donor_eligibility_verified_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this registration has been verified for donor eligibility purposes (e.g., eligible to receive grants from institutional donors, government agencies, or foundations). True if verified; False if not verified or verification pending.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the statutory registration becomes legally effective and the organization can operate under this registration.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the statutory registration expires and requires renewal. Null for registrations with indefinite validity.']
  foreign_operations_permitted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this registration permits the organization to conduct operations or provide services outside the jurisdiction of registration. True if foreign operations are permitted; False if restricted to domestic operations only.']
  foundation_status varchar [note: 'Classification of the organization as a public charity or type of private foundation. Relevant for US 501(c)(3) organizations.']
  jurisdiction_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code representing the jurisdiction where the organization is registered (e.g., USA, GBR, KEN).']
  last_filing_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent regulatory filing or report submitted under this registration.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this statutory registration record was last updated or modified.']
  next_filing_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next regulatory filing or report is due to maintain compliance with this registration.']
  next_renewal_date date [note: 'Date by which the next renewal application or filing must be submitted to maintain active registration status.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, special conditions, or contextual information about this statutory registration.']
  operating_authority_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this registration grants legal authority to operate programs and services in the jurisdiction. True if operating authority is granted; False if registration is for tax or reporting purposes only.']
  public_charity_classification varchar [note: 'IRS public charity classification under Section 509(a). 509(a)(1) for publicly supported organizations; 509(a)(2) for organizations receiving substantial support from program service revenue; 509(a)(3) for supporting organizations; Private Foundation if not qualifying as public charity; Not Applicable for non-US registrations.']
  registered_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the official registered address on file with the statutory authority.']
  registered_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the official registered address (suite, floor, building name, etc.).']
  registered_city varchar [note: 'City or municipality of the official registered address.']
  registered_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code of the official registered address.']
  registered_legal_name varchar [note: 'The official legal name of the organization as registered with the statutory authority. This is the name that appears on the determination letter or registration certificate.']
  registered_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code or ZIP code of the official registered address.']
  registered_state_province varchar [note: 'State, province, or administrative region of the official registered address.']
  registration_date date [note: 'Date when the statutory registration was officially granted or approved by the regulatory authority.']
  registration_document_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the scanned copy of the official registration certificate, determination letter, or registration document.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration number or identifier issued by the regulatory authority (e.g., EIN for US 501(c)(3), Charity Commission registration number).']
  registration_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the statutory registration. Active indicates valid and in good standing; Pending indicates application submitted but not yet approved; Suspended indicates temporary hold; Revoked indicates permanently cancelled; Expired indicates past validity period; Lapsed indicates not renewed.']
  registration_type varchar [note: 'Type of statutory registration. Examples: 501(c)(3) for US tax-exempt status, Charity Commission for UK charities, NGO Registration for country-level registrations, Foreign Agent for FARA compliance, CSO (Civil Society Organization) Registration, INGO (International Non-Governmental Organization) Registration.']
  regulatory_authority_name varchar [note: 'Name of the government agency or regulatory body that issued and oversees this registration (e.g., Internal Revenue Service, Charity Commission for England and Wales, Ministry of Social Affairs).']
  renewal_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the statutory registration must be renewed. Not applicable for registrations that do not require renewal.']
  renewal_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this registration requires periodic renewal. True if renewal is required; False if registration is indefinite or does not require renewal.']
  reporting_requirement_description varchar [note: 'Description of the periodic reporting obligations associated with this registration (e.g., annual Form 990 filing, Charity Commission annual return, quarterly financial reports).']
  tax_exempt_status varchar [note: 'Tax exemption status granted under this registration. Exempt indicates full tax-exempt status; Non-exempt indicates no tax exemption; Conditional indicates exemption with specific conditions; Pending indicates exemption application under review.']

  Note: 'Master record of the organization\'s legal registrations and statutory status across all operating jurisdictions, including US 501(c)(3) IRS determination letter, UK Charity Commission registration, country-level NGO registrations, and foreign agent registrations. Captures jurisdiction, registration type, registration number, registration date, expiry date, registered name, registered address, and renewal requirements. Foundational for legal operating authority and donor eligibility verification.'
}

Table compliance.internal_review {
  internal_review_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for internal_review']
  award_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the grant or award being reviewed for compliance. Nullable if the review is not grant-specific.']
  compliance_incident_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.incident. Business justification: Compliance incidents often trigger internal reviews to investigate the incident, determine root cause, and assess impact. One internal review investigates one primary incident; one incident may trigge']
  country_office_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the country office or field location that is the subject of this compliance review.']
  intervention_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific program or project under review. Nullable if the review is office-wide rather than program-specific.']
  primary_internal_user_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the system user who created this compliance review record. Audit trail for accountability.']
  reviewed_system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: Internal compliance reviews examine specific systems for regulatory compliance, data quality, and control effectiveness. Nonprofits must link reviews to systems for finding attribution, remediation tr']
  security_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.security_assessment. Business justification: Internal compliance reviews often trigger or reference security assessments for systems handling sensitive data (beneficiary PII, financial data). Nonprofits coordinate these for integrated assurance,']
  staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or auditor who led the compliance review. Links to workforce or staff master data.']
  compliance_framework_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific compliance framework, policy, or regulation against which the review was conducted (e.g., OMB 2 CFR 200, CHS, organizational policy number).']
  corrective_action_plan_due_date date [note: 'Date by which management must submit a corrective action plan addressing the review findings. Nullable if no corrective action is required.']
  corrective_action_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether corrective action is required as a result of the review findings. True if management must implement remediation actions.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this compliance review record was first created in the system. Audit trail for record creation.']
  critical_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of critical-severity findings identified during the review. Critical findings represent significant control failures or compliance violations requiring immediate action.']
  donor_notification_date date [note: 'Date when the donor or funding agency was formally notified of the review findings. Nullable if notification is not required.']
  donor_notification_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether the donor or funding agency must be notified of the review findings. True for material findings affecting grant compliance.']
  external_auditor_coordination_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether this internal review was coordinated with or informed by external auditor activities (e.g., Single Audit). True if coordination occurred.']
  follow_up_review_required_flag boolean [note: 'Boolean indicator of whether a follow-up review is required to verify implementation of corrective actions. True for reviews with significant findings requiring validation.']
  follow_up_review_scheduled_date date [note: 'Planned date for the follow-up review to verify corrective action implementation. Nullable if no follow-up is required.']
  high_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of high-severity findings identified during the review. High findings represent material weaknesses requiring prompt remediation.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this compliance review record was last updated. Audit trail for record changes.']
  low_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of low-severity findings identified during the review. Low findings represent minor control gaps or opportunities for improvement.']
  management_response_received_date date [note: 'Date when management formally responded to the review findings and submitted their corrective action plan.']
  medium_findings_count varchar [note: 'Number of medium-severity findings identified during the review. Medium findings represent control weaknesses that should be addressed in a reasonable timeframe.']
  overall_compliance_rating varchar [note: 'Summary assessment of the overall compliance posture based on the review findings. Provides an executive-level view of compliance health (satisfactory, needs improvement, unsatisfactory, high risk).']
  population_size varchar [note: 'Total number of transactions, cases, or records in the population from which the sample was drawn. Provides context for sample representativeness.']
  report_document_url varchar [note: 'File path or URL to the stored compliance review report document. Provides access to the full detailed report.']
  report_issued_date date [note: 'Date when the final compliance review report was formally issued to management and stakeholders.']
  review_end_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance review fieldwork was completed and findings were finalized. Nullable for reviews still in progress.']
  review_methodology varchar [note: 'Primary audit methodology or approach used to conduct the compliance review (risk-based, transaction testing, control testing, analytical review, walkthrough, observation).']
  review_notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes, observations, or context about the compliance review that do not fit structured fields. May include reviewer commentary or special circumstances.']
  review_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for the compliance review, typically formatted as prefix-year-sequence (e.g., ICR-2024-00123).']
  review_period_end_date date [note: 'End date of the operational period being reviewed. Defines the end of the time window under examination.']
  review_period_start_date date [note: 'Start date of the operational period being reviewed. Defines the beginning of the time window under examination (distinct from when the review itself started).']
  review_scope_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the scope, objectives, and boundaries of the compliance review. Explains what was included and excluded from the review.']
  review_start_date date [note: 'Date when the compliance review fieldwork commenced. Represents the beginning of the review period for audit trail purposes.']
  review_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the compliance review (planned, fieldwork in progress, draft report, management response pending, final report issued, closed with follow-up complete).']
  review_team_members varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of staff names or identifiers who participated in the review team. Captures the full review team composition.']
  review_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the internal compliance review activity. Defines the focus area and scope of the review (financial spot check, procurement review, programmatic compliance, data protection audit, conflict of interest certification review, grant compliance review).']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Quantitative risk score assigned to the reviewed entity based on findings severity and control environment. Typically on a scale of 0-100 where higher scores indicate greater risk.']
  sample_size varchar [note: 'Number of transactions, cases, or records sampled during the compliance review. Represents the statistical sample used for testing.']
  total_findings_count varchar [note: 'Total number of findings across all severity levels identified during the compliance review.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of internal compliance reviews, spot checks, and programmatic audits conducted by the compliance or internal audit function. Captures review type (financial spot check, procurement review, programmatic compliance, data protection audit, COI certification review), review scope, country office or program reviewed, review period, lead reviewer, findings count by severity, overall compliance rating, and follow-up actions required. Distinct from external Single Audits — these are internally initiated compliance assurance activities that verify ongoing adherence to policies, donor requirements, and corrective action plan closure.'
}

Table compliance.sanctions_screening {
  sanctions_screening_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the sanctions screening record. Primary key.']
  compliance_incident_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.compliance_incident. Business justification: When a sanctions screening identifies a non-false-positive match (match_result indicates hit, false_positive_flag = false), it triggers a compliance incident requiring investigation and resolution. Th']
  donor_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.donor_requirement. Business justification: Sanctions screening (OFAC, debarment lists) is often mandated by specific donor compliance requirements. The sanctions_screening table has donor_requirement_flag, donor_name, and grant_reference_numbe']
  rescreening_sanctions_screening_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sanctions_screening (rescreening_sanctions_screening_id)']
  screening_system_platform_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to technology.system_platform. Business justification: Sanctions screening is performed through dedicated platforms (Dow Jones, World-Check, OFAC screening tools). Nonprofits must document which system performed each screening for audit trail, donor compl']
  certification_statement varchar [note: 'Text of the anti-terrorism certification or compliance statement that this screening supports.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sanctions screening record was first created in the system.']
  false_positive_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a potential match was determined to be a false positive after investigation.']
  legal_basis varchar [note: 'Legal authority or executive order requiring the sanctions screening (e.g., US Executive Order 13224, UN Security Council Resolution 1267, EU Regulation 2580/2001).']
  match_details varchar [note: 'Detailed information about the match, including list entry details, matching criteria, and any aliases or alternate spellings that triggered the match.']
  match_result varchar [note: 'Outcome of the sanctions screening check indicating whether the subject was found on any sanctions list.']
  match_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical confidence score (0-100) indicating the likelihood of a true match when potential matches are identified. Higher scores indicate stronger matches.']
  next_screening_due_date date [note: 'Date when the next periodic rescreening is due for this subject.']
  rescreening_frequency_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between required rescreening checks for this subject (e.g., 90, 180, 365).']
  rescreening_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether periodic rescreening is required for this subject based on risk profile or donor requirements.']
  resolution_action varchar [note: 'Action taken to resolve a potential or confirmed match (e.g., cleared after review, engagement blocked, escalated to legal, OFAC license requested, alternative vendor sourced).']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the screening result was resolved and a final determination was made.']
  resolution_notes varchar [note: 'Detailed notes documenting the investigation, evidence reviewed, and rationale for the resolution decision.']
  reviewer_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the reviewer who approved the resolution decision.']
  reviewer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the senior compliance officer or legal counsel who reviewed and approved the resolution of a potential or confirmed match.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall risk rating assigned to the subject based on screening results, geographic factors, and business context.']
  sanctions_list_checked varchar [note: 'Name of the sanctions or debarment list(s) checked during this screening. Pipe-separated list for multiple lists (e.g., OFAC SDN|UN Security Council|EU Sanctions|World Bank Debarment).']
  screener_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the staff member who performed the screening, for audit trail and follow-up purposes.']
  screener_name varchar [note: 'Name of the staff member or compliance officer who performed or initiated the screening.']
  screening_date date [note: 'Date when the sanctions screening check was performed.']
  screening_method varchar [note: 'Method used to perform the sanctions screening check.']
  screening_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the sanctions screening record in the compliance workflow.']
  screening_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Precise timestamp when the sanctions screening check was initiated, including time zone information.']
  screening_tool varchar [note: 'Name of the software tool or service used to perform the screening (e.g., Dow Jones Risk & Compliance, LexisNexis Bridger, manual OFAC search).']
  subject_address varchar [note: 'Known address or location of the subject being screened, used for geographic risk assessment.']
  subject_date_of_birth date [note: 'Date of birth of the individual being screened, used for identity matching and disambiguation.']
  subject_identifier varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the subject in the source system (e.g., vendor ID, staff ID, beneficiary registration number).']
  subject_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the individual or organization being screened. May include legal name, aliases, or transliterations.']
  subject_nationality varchar [note: 'Nationality or country of citizenship of the individual or country of registration for organizations. Pipe-separated list for multiple nationalities.']
  subject_type varchar [note: 'Type of entity being screened against sanctions lists.']
  supporting_documentation varchar [note: 'References to supporting documents, evidence, or file paths for screening reports, investigation notes, and approval records.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sanctions screening record was last modified.']

  Note: 'Master record of sanctions and debarment screening checks performed against OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control), UN Security Council, EU, and other sanctions lists for vendors, partners, staff, and beneficiaries. Captures screening date, subject name, list checked, match result (clear, potential match, confirmed match), resolution action, screener identity, and re-screening frequency. Critical for anti-terrorism certification compliance required by USAID, DFID, and EU donors, and for organizational due diligence under US Executive Orders and UN resolutions.'
}

Table compliance.cognizant_agency {
  cognizant_agency_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for cognizant_agency']
  parent_agency_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent or umbrella agency if this cognizant agency is a sub-agency or division of a larger governmental body.']
  parent_cognizant_agency_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on cognizant_agency (parent_cognizant_agency_id)']
  agency_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the cognizant agency\'s official mailing address (street address, building number).']
  agency_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the cognizant agency\'s official mailing address (suite, floor, department).']
  agency_city varchar [note: 'City where the cognizant agency is located.']
  agency_code varchar [note: 'Official alphanumeric code assigned to the cognizant agency by the federal government or oversight body. Used as the business identifier in grant documentation and audit reports.']
  agency_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO country code for the cognizant agency\'s location.']
  agency_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the cognizant agency responsible for oversight and audit coordination.']
  agency_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the cognizant agency\'s address.']
  agency_short_name varchar [note: 'Abbreviated or commonly used short name for the cognizant agency (e.g., USAID, HHS, DOD).']
  agency_state_province varchar [note: 'State, province, or administrative region where the cognizant agency is located.']
  agency_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the cognizant agency by governmental or organizational level.']
  audit_frequency_months varchar [note: 'Required frequency of audits coordinated by the cognizant agency, expressed in months (e.g., 12 for annual, 24 for biennial).']
  compliance_framework varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory or compliance framework that the cognizant agency enforces (e.g., OMB Uniform Guidance, FAR, DFARS).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this cognizant agency record was first created in the system.']
  designation_date date [note: 'Date when the agency was officially designated as the cognizant agency for the organization.']
  designation_end_date date [note: 'Date when the cognizant agency designation ended or is scheduled to end. Null for ongoing designations.']
  federal_award_threshold_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'Minimum dollar threshold of federal awards that triggers cognizant agency oversight responsibility, expressed in US dollars.']
  indirect_cost_rate_approval_authority boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cognizant agency has authority to approve indirect cost rate proposals for organizations under its oversight.']
  is_primary_cognizant_agency boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is the primary cognizant agency for the organization when multiple agencies have oversight roles.']
  jurisdiction_scope varchar [note: 'Description of the geographic or programmatic scope of the cognizant agency\'s oversight authority (e.g., nationwide, regional, sector-specific).']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this cognizant agency record was last updated or modified.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, special instructions, or contextual information about the cognizant agency\'s oversight requirements or relationship with the organization.']
  oversight_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the cognizant agency\'s oversight authority.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Official email address of the primary contact at the cognizant agency for audit coordination and compliance inquiries.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the primary contact person at the cognizant agency for audit and compliance matters.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the cognizant agency contact person.']
  primary_contact_title varchar [note: 'Job title or position of the primary contact person at the cognizant agency.']
  reporting_portal_url varchar [note: 'URL of the online portal where organizations submit compliance reports and audit documentation to the cognizant agency.']
  single_audit_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the cognizant agency requires Single Audit Act compliance for organizations under its oversight.']
  website_url varchar [note: 'Official website URL of the cognizant agency for accessing compliance guidance and resources.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for cognizant_agency. Referenced by cognizant_agency_id.'
}

Table safeguarding.psea_policy {
  psea_policy_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the PSEA policy record. Primary key.']
  superseded_policy_psea_policy_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the previous policy version that this policy replaces. Null if this is the first version.']
  superseded_psea_policy_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on psea_policy (superseded_psea_policy_id)']
  acknowledgment_audience varchar [note: 'Target audience required to acknowledge the policy (e.g., All Staff, Field Staff, Volunteers, Partners, Board Members).']
  acknowledgment_deadline_days varchar [note: 'Number of days from policy effective date or staff onboarding within which acknowledgment must be completed.']
  approval_authority varchar [note: 'Name or title of the individual or body that approved the policy (e.g., Board of Directors, Executive Director, Country Director).']
  approval_date date [note: 'Date when the policy was formally approved by the designated authority.']
  compliance_standard varchar [note: 'Industry or humanitarian standards the policy aligns with (e.g., CHS, Sphere, HAP, Keeping Children Safe).']
  confidentiality_clause varchar [note: 'Summary of confidentiality and data protection provisions within the policy.']
  country_code varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for country-specific policies. Null for global policies.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the policy record was first created in the system.']
  document_language varchar [note: 'ISO 639-1 two-letter language code of the policy document (e.g., en, fr, es, ar).']
  document_url varchar [note: 'URL or file path to the full policy document stored in the document management system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the policy becomes binding and enforceable across the organization.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the policy is scheduled to expire or be reviewed. Null for policies without expiration.']
  last_modified_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the individual who last modified the policy record.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the policy record was last updated in the system.']
  legal_framework_reference varchar [note: 'Citation of relevant legal or regulatory frameworks that inform the policy (e.g., UN Convention on the Rights of the Child, local child protection laws).']
  mandatory_acknowledgment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether staff, volunteers, or partners are required to formally acknowledge and sign this policy.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next mandatory policy review.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or context regarding the policy document or its implementation.']
  policy_category varchar [note: 'Functional category of the policy within the safeguarding framework.']
  policy_description varchar [note: 'Detailed summary of the policy purpose, scope, and key provisions.']
  policy_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique identifier for the policy document, typically following organizational numbering convention (e.g., PSEA-2024-001).']
  policy_owner varchar [note: 'Department or role responsible for maintaining and updating the policy (e.g., Safeguarding Team, Human Resources, Compliance).']
  policy_title varchar [note: 'Official title of the PSEA, child safeguarding, or code of conduct policy document.']
  policy_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the safeguarding policy document type. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: PSEA|Child Safeguarding|Code of Conduct|Whistleblower|Survivor Support|Beneficiary Protection|Staff Conduct — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  psea_policy_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the policy document.']
  reporting_mechanism_description varchar [note: 'Description of the reporting channels and procedures outlined in the policy for safeguarding concerns or violations.']
  review_cycle_months varchar [note: 'Frequency in months at which the policy must be reviewed and updated (e.g., 12, 24, 36).']
  sanctions_description varchar [note: 'Description of disciplinary actions or sanctions for policy violations.']
  scope varchar [note: 'Geographic or organizational scope of policy applicability (global, country-specific, program-specific).']
  training_required_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether formal training is required for this policy.']
  translation_available_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether translations of the policy are available in other languages.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the policy document (e.g., 1.0, 2.1).']
  created_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the individual who created the policy record.']

  Note: 'Master catalog of organizational Protection from Sexual Exploitation and Abuse (PSEA) policies, child safeguarding policies, and staff code of conduct documents. Captures policy version, effective date, scope (global, country, program), approval authority, mandatory acknowledgment requirements, and review cycle. Serves as the authoritative reference for all safeguarding policy obligations across the organization.'
}

  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Incidents occur within organizational units tracked as cost centers. Incident response costs (investigation, survivor support, legal) must be allocated to the responsible cost center for budget tracki']

Required for incident investigation, distribution safety protocols, and beneficiary protection durin']

Essential for donor relations risk management, due diligence, and relationship decisions when safeguarding all']
  finance_fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.finance_fund.
