  problem_subcategory varchar [note: 'Detailed subcategory providing more specific classification within the problem category.']
  recurring_problem boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this is a recurring problem that has occurred multiple times.']
  reported_by varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the person who initially reported or identified the problem.']
  reported_date date [note: 'Date when the problem was first reported or identified.']
  resolution_date date [note: 'Date when the permanent solution was implemented and the problem was resolved.']
  resolution_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the permanent solution implemented to resolve the problem.']
  root_cause_description varchar [note: 'Detailed explanation of the underlying root cause identified through problem investigation.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Technical severity level indicating the extent of service disruption or degradation.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the IT problem record.']
  title varchar [note: 'Brief descriptive title summarizing the IT problem.']
  urgency varchar [note: 'Time sensitivity for resolving the problem based on business needs.']
  vendor_reference varchar [note: 'External vendor case or ticket number if the problem involves third-party systems or support.']
  workaround_description varchar [note: 'Temporary solution or workaround to mitigate the problem impact while permanent resolution is developed.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for it_problem. Referenced by related_problem_id.'
}

Table technology.knowledge_article {
  knowledge_article_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for knowledge_article']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the organizational department or unit that owns or is responsible for this knowledge article.']
  owner_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or team responsible for maintaining and updating the knowledge article.']
  reviewer_staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member who reviewed and approved the knowledge article for publication.']
  staff_member_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the staff member or user who originally authored the knowledge article.']
  superseded_knowledge_article_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on knowledge_article (superseded_knowledge_article_id)']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this knowledge article was approved for publication by the designated reviewer.']
  archived_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article was archived or moved out of active publication status.']
  article_number varchar [note: 'Externally visible unique identifier for the knowledge article, used for reference and citation across systems and by end users.']
  article_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the knowledge article by its purpose and structure, such as how-to guide, troubleshooting procedure, frequently asked question, reference documentation, or policy statement.']
  attachment_count varchar [note: 'Number of file attachments associated with this knowledge article, such as documents, images, or reference materials.']
  average_rating decimal(3,2) [note: 'Average user rating score for the knowledge article on a scale of 0.00 to 5.00, calculated from user feedback.']
  category varchar [note: 'Primary business or functional category to which this knowledge article belongs, such as IT Infrastructure, Data Governance, Security, Field Operations, or Program Management.']
  content varchar [note: 'Full text body of the knowledge article, containing the detailed information, instructions, procedures, or reference material.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this knowledge article record was first created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article becomes effective and applicable, particularly important for policy and procedure articles.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article expires or is scheduled for review and potential retirement, ensuring content freshness.']
  external_url varchar [note: 'Web address or hyperlink to external resources or related documentation referenced by this knowledge article.']
  helpful_count varchar [note: 'Number of users who have marked this knowledge article as helpful, used for quality assessment and content improvement.']
  is_featured boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this knowledge article is featured or promoted in the knowledge base interface for high visibility.']
  is_searchable boolean [note: 'Boolean flag indicating whether this knowledge article is included in search indexes and discoverable through knowledge base search functionality.']
  keywords varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of keywords and tags associated with the knowledge article to facilitate search and discovery.']
  language_code varchar [note: 'Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code indicating the language in which the knowledge article is written.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this knowledge article record was last modified or updated.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next periodic review of this knowledge article to ensure continued accuracy and relevance.']
  not_helpful_count varchar [note: 'Number of users who have marked this knowledge article as not helpful, used for quality assessment and content improvement.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Business priority or importance level of the knowledge article, used to determine visibility and promotion in knowledge base interfaces.']
  published_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article was first published and made available to its intended audience.']
  related_system varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the IT system, platform, or application that this knowledge article primarily addresses, such as KoboToolbox, CommCare, DHIS2, Salesforce, or SAP.']
  retired_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article was permanently retired and removed from the knowledge base.']
  review_date date [note: 'Date on which this knowledge article was last reviewed for accuracy and relevance by a subject matter expert.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the knowledge article, indicating whether it is in draft, under review, approved for publication, actively published, archived for reference, or retired from use.']
  subcategory varchar [note: 'Secondary classification within the primary category, providing more granular topical organization for the knowledge article.']
  summary varchar [note: 'Brief abstract or executive summary of the knowledge article content, used for search results and quick reference.']
  title varchar [note: 'The primary title or headline of the knowledge article, used for search and display purposes.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version identifier for the knowledge article, following semantic versioning convention (major.minor), incremented with each published revision.']
  view_count varchar [note: 'Cumulative number of times this knowledge article has been viewed by users, used for usage analytics and popularity ranking.']
  visibility varchar [note: 'Access control classification indicating who can view this knowledge article: public (external users), internal (all staff), restricted (specific teams), or confidential (named individuals).']

  Note: 'Master reference table for knowledge_article. Referenced by knowledge_article_id.'
}
